title: Merchantate
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''Merchantate''' was the title conveyed by the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorians]] to the business leaders of an [[Ithorian Herdship]]. Each one of these individuals also possessed a vote on the herdships commerce council.

==Appearances==
*''[[Graveyard of Alderaan]]'' {{Reprint|Graveyard of Alderaan}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
